title: Report on the proposed Automotive Innovation Grants scheme by UK Research and Innovation
body: "The Subsidy Advice Unit (SAU) has published its report providing advice to UKRI concerning the proposed Automotive Innovation Grants Scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of UKRI’s Assessment of Compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Automotive Innovation Grants scheme by UK Research and Innovation "
